Bash(node -e "import\('./scripts/lib/dashboard-data.mjs'\).then\(m=>{for\(const r of [undefined,'1','2']\){const d=m.buildDashboardData\(process.cwd\(\),{run:r}\);console.log\('run='+\(r??'default\(active\)'\),'=> id',d.run.id,'|',d.run.label,'| status',d.run.status,'| periods',JSON.stringify\(d.periods\),'| kpis',Object.keys\(d.kpis\).length,'| preds',d.predictions.length\);}}\)")
